payload.summary: Implement US-065 unlimited Codex app-server task runtime

payload.notes: E08 Symphony Web UI Controller runtime reliability slice.
payload.title: Unlimited Codex app-server task runtime

payload.evidence: Removed Codex app-server fixed wall-clock deadline; added zero-timeout in-progress reconciliation and failed terminal-turn tests; cargo fmt --check, cargo test -p harness-symphony agent::tests -- --nocapture, cargo test --workspace, cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings, npm web-ui build/e2e, config show, doctor uncapped probe, and git diff --check passed.

payload.current_pain: Cargo tests inherited HARNESS_RUN_ID and appended internal test operations to the active run changeset.
payload.predicted_impact: Future run changesets stay story-scoped during validation.
payload.suggested_improvement: Symphony should run validation commands with HARNESS_RUN_ID and HARNESS_RUN_MODE unset unless the command intentionally writes run evidence.
payload.title: Isolate validation commands from run operation log env

payload.actions_taken: ["read Harness docs and US-065 packet","removed Codex wall-clock deadline","added Codex lifecycle tests","updated config and doctor runtime wording","ran Rust and Web validation","updated durable story proof and run changeset"]
payload.decisions_made: ["Kept custom adapter behavior out of scope","kept API shape unchanged","used existing protocol stall reconciliation as the Codex guard instead of a fixed wall-clock deadline"]
payload.errors: ["cargo fmt --check initially reported formatting before rustfmt","test commands initially polluted the run changeset through inherited HARNESS_RUN_ID and the changeset was regenerated cleanly"]
payload.harness_friction: Validation commands can inherit run operation-log env and append internal test writes to the active run changeset; backlog item recorded.
payload.notes: Validation passed: cargo fmt --check; cargo test -p harness-symphony agent::tests -- --nocapture; cargo test --workspace; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run build; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run e2e; config show uncapped probe; doctor uncapped probe; git diff --check.
payload.task_summary: Completed US-065 unlimited Codex app-server runtime

payload.verify_command: env -u HARNESS_RUN_ID -u HARNESS_RUN_MODE cargo test -p harness-symphony agent::tests -- --nocapture
